ASR-1.name: Quality Before Completion
ASR-1.description: QualityInspection or QualitySorting must occur before ProductionComplete
ASR-1.formula: ∀ case c: ProductionComplete ∈ c → ∃ QualityInspection ∈ c ∧ time(QualityInspection) < time(ProductionComplete)

ASR-2.name: Start Before Process
ASR-2.description: StartProduction must occur before ProcessLogs in a valid production sequence
ASR-2.formula: ∀ case c: ProcessLogs ∈ c → ∃ StartProduction ∈ c ∧ time(StartProduction) < time(first ProcessLogs)

ASR-3.name: Maintenance Before Resume
ASR-3.description: After BreakdownMechanical/BreakdownElectrical, MaintenancePlanned/MaintenanceUnplanned must occur before ProcessLogs resumes
ASR-3.formula: ∀ case c: Breakdown × ∈ c → ∃ Maintenance × ∈ c ∧ time(Maintenance) > time(Breakdown) ∧ time(Maintenance) < time(next ProcessLogs)

MSR-1.name: Quality Check Required
MSR-1.description: Every completed production batch must have at least one quality activity
MSR-1.formula: ∀ case c: ProductionComplete ∈ c → |{QualityInspection, QualitySorting} ∩ c| ≥ 1

MSR-2.name: Shift Boundary Required
MSR-2.description: Production runs spanning >8 hours must include ShiftEnd events

TR-1.name: Maintenance Duration Limit
TR-1.description: MaintenanceHours should not exceed 2x the DowntimeHours (efficiency rule)

TR-2.name: Production Yield Threshold
TR-2.description: YieldPercent must be ≥25% for valid production (below indicates major issues)

TR-3.name: Excessive Downtime Alert
TR-3.description: DowntimeHours exceeding 4 hours indicates conformance violation requiring investigation

OFR-1.name: Object Type Consistency
OFR-1.description: Each event must be associated with exactly one primary object type

OFR-2.name: Mill Assignment Consistency
OFR-2.description: Within a case, Mill should not change without explicit handover

RR-1.name: Equipment Status Validity
RR-1.description: Maintenance activities must have EquipmentStatus = 'Maintenance' or 'Breakdown'
RR-1.formula: ∀ event e ∈ {MaintenancePlanned, MaintenanceUnplanned, SawBladeChange, ConveyorMaintenance}: EquipmentStatus(e) ∈ {Maintenance, Breakdown}

QR-1.name: Quality Grade Threshold
QR-1.description: QualityGradeA must be ≥60% for acceptable production

QR-2.name: Defect Rate Limits
QR-2.description: Individual defect rates should not exceed 8% (critical quality issue)
QR-2.formula: ∀ defect_rate ∈ {Moisture, Twisting, BlueStain, Knot, Crack}: rate ≤ 8%
